name: cmd/orchestrator Coverage

tasks.title: Cover remaining newCriteriaCmd branches
tasks.body:
cmd/orchestrator/ is at 91.3% with a single gap: newCriteriaCmd (criteria.go:13) at 89.7%.

This is a small gap requiring ~3% improvement. Read criteria.go and the existing criteria_test.go to identify exactly which branches are uncovered. Likely candidates:
- Error paths: invalid node address, node not found, node is a leaf (not orchestrator)
- JSON output mode for criteria operations
- Edge cases in criteria text handling (empty string, very long strings)

This is a targeted fix — probably 2-3 additional test cases will close the gap.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in cmd/orchestrator Coverage is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify cmd/orchestrator/ coverage reaches 94%+ via go test -cover ./cmd/orchestrator/. Key function: newCriteriaCmd.

breadcrumbs.text: Added two tests to criteria_coverage_test.go covering the empty nodeAddr guard (line 29-31) and the ReadNode error path in list mode (line 36-38). newCriteriaCmd now at 100% statement coverage.

Audit complete: build passes, all 26 packages green, go vet clean, gofmt clean, race detector clean. cmd/orchestrator at 100% statement coverage. criteria.go and criteria_coverage_test.go reviewed for correctness — nil safety, error handling, edge cases all sound. No findings.

audit.result_summary: Raised cmd/orchestrator package from 91.3% to 100% statement coverage by adding two targeted tests in criteria_coverage_test.go: one covering the internal empty-nodeAddr guard (bypassing cobra's required-flag validation to hit the defensive check), and one covering the ReadNode error path in list mode via an invalid path-traversal address. All tests pass, race detector clean, no formatting or vet issues.
